title: School and Good-byes
description: Module 5 — visiting a school, helping others and taking leave: permission and desire (you can / want to), prepositions of place, adverbs in -ly, comparing with like, can/cannot, how much/how many, apologies and farewells, and the -ed ending sounds
sources: Let's Learn English — 7th year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541702) — Module Five
English Programme for Basic Education, Ministry of Education, Tunisia (March 2005)
